input_natural_language: Exceeding sensor limits shall latch an autopilot pullup when the pilot is not in control (not standby) and the system is supported without failures (not apfail).
explanation: This LTL property states that whenever sensor limits are exceeded, and the pilot is not in control and the system is supported without failures, then an autopilot pullup will take place. This reflects the conditions required for the autopilot pullup to be triggered based on the sensor and control status of the pilot.
decision1_substring: when the pilot is not in control (not standby) and the system is supported without failures (not apfail)
output_structured_natural_language: only while !standby & supported & !apfail, whenever limits, immediately satisfy pullup
